creator: yuri.pankov@gmail.com
text:
And it looks like distfile was changed again (what's happening there? or 
is it my ISP?):

polaris:root:/usr/ports/irc/irssi-devel# make install clean
===>  Found saved configuration for irssi-devel-20120110
=> irssi-20120624.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch 
http://mirror.irssi.org/snapshots/irssi-20120624.tar.gz
fetch: http://mirror.irssi.org/snapshots/irssi-20120624.tar.gz: size 
mismatch: expected 1331265, actual 1331262
